name: Macaroni and No-Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Elbow macaroni made without eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly oil a round 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
3. Put 1 inch of water in a large saucepan with a steamer basket, cover with the lid, and bring to a gentle boil.
4. Put the butternut squash in the steamer basket, cover and steam until the squash is tender, 25 to 20 minutes.
5. Cool, and peel off the squash skin.
6. Put half the steamed squash, the miso, hot water, nutritional yeast flakes, raw tahini, tamari, and black pepper in a blender, and blend until smooth.
7. Meanwhile, in a large pot of lightly salted boiling water, cook the macaroni until just tender, about 8 minutes. Drain well.
8. Transfer to a large bowl.
9. Add the tahini-squash mixture and the cubed squash and mix well.
10. Transfer the macaroni mixture to the baking dish.
11. Sprinkle the top with the bread crumbs.
12. Bake until heated through, about 20 minutes. Serve immediately.
